data.title: South Korea Blocks Unregistered Crypto Apps, Targets KuCoin
data.description:
South Korea blocks 14 unregistered crypto apps, impacting KuCoin and MEXC, to prevent money laundering.
source: https://coincu.com/332290-south-korea-blocks-crypto-apps

data.title: Solana rally at risk as bearish shooting star appears on daily chart
data.description:
Solana’s 40% rally from $95. 23 faces a threat from a shooting star candlestick. Technicals show bullish MACD but fragile momentum with $125–$128 support key. Macro pressures and competition challenge SOL’s ability to sustain the $147
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/solana-rally-at-risk-as-bearish-shooting-star-appears-on-daily-chart/

data.title: OKX Web3 wallet is launched at Cryptopedia's 32nd BitcoinOS special event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, OKX Web3 wallet is now online Cryptopedia's 32nd BitcoinOS special event, which includes three projects: BitcoinOS, BIMA and ZenChain. The event will be held from 18:00 on April 9, 2025 to 18:00 on May 7, 2025 (HKT). During this period, users can complete and verify the interactive tasks of BitcoinOS and its ecological projects through Cryptopedia, and have the opportunity to share BOS tokens with a total value of 750,000 USDT, BOOM tokens with a total value of 20,000 USDT and 10,000 USDC rewards.
It is reported that BitcoinOS transforms the Web3 ecosystem by directly enabling zero-knowledge (zk) proofs on the Bitcoin network, elevating Bitcoin from a value store to a universal settlement and security layer for the crypto ecosystem, which not only retains Bitcoin's unparalleled security model, but also unlocks new potential for smart contracts and computing functions.

data.title: Bitcoin Market Dynamics Shift Amid Institutional Influence
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Crypto Dan has observed a notable shift in the Bitcoin market dynamics. Unlike previous cycles characterized by rapid price surges and a significant influx of short-term holders, the current market remains unusually calm despite price increases. The proportion of Bitcoin held for one week to one month is significantly lower than in past cycles, indicating a lack of explosive new capital and participants.

The change is attributed to several factors. Firstly, the nature of liquidity has evolved. The bull market of 2020–2021 occurred under an exceptional macroeconomic environment of near-zero interest rates and aggressive quantitative easing. Currently, the market is experiencing high interest rates and liquidity tightening, making large-scale price surges more challenging.

Secondly, the market's leadership has shifted from retail investors to institutions. Since the approval of Bitcoin ETFs, the market has become more structured, with institutional capital exerting increasing influence. This has resulted in a "stair-step" gradual increase in Bitcoin prices, contrasting with the rapid and frenzied rallies of the past.

As a result, the market appears more cautious. Given these structural changes, some on-chain indicators suggest that the current cycle may have peaked. This cycle might not follow the traditional "boom-bust" pattern. Instead, the market could be entering a longer, more complex structure. ETF inflows continue, and the macroeconomic environment may gradually ease, suggesting that 2025 could still offer significant market opportunities.

data.title: Hong Kong Releases Guidelines for Generative AI Technology and Applications
data.description:
According to PANews, the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government's Digital Policy Office has released the "Guidelines on Generative AI Technology and Applications." These guidelines aim to provide practical operational guidance for technology developers, service providers, and users in applying generative AI technology. The content of the guidelines covers the scope of application, limitations, potential risks, and governance principles of generative AI technology, including technical risks such as data leakage, model bias, and errors.

Digital Policy Commissioner Wong Chi-kwong stated at the World Internet Conference Asia-Pacific Summit's AI Model Forum this morning that the Special Administrative Region Government hopes to promote the safe and responsible development and application of generative AI technology through these guidelines. The goal is to encourage innovation in AI technology applications while reducing risks and promoting the widespread development of generative AI in Hong Kong.

data.title: Brazilian public company Meliuz proposes to expand its Bitcoin reserve strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Brazilian listed company Meliuz proposes to expand its Bitcoin reserve strategy. The company plans to hold a special shareholders' meeting on May 6, 2025, proposing to amend the company's articles of association to include Bitcoin investment in the corporate purpose. Once approved by shareholders, Bitcoin will become the main strategic asset of Meliuz's treasury. The company said that while keeping its existing core business unchanged, it will continue to increase its holdings of Bitcoin using operating cash flow.

data.title: USDD is listed on sTRX Vault and a limited-time promotion is launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, at 16:00 on April 15, USDD officially launched the sTRX Vault minting function, opening a new channel for users to earn efficient returns. Users can obtain sTRX income tokens by staking TRX in JustLend DAO, and deposit them in USDD Vault to mint USDD, enjoying the dual returns of JustLend DAO sTRX staking income and USDD up to 20% annualized return (APY). As a liquidity staking token, sTRX has both flexibility and continuous income characteristics, providing users with a stable value-added path. The launch of sTRX Vault further deepens the application of USDD in the TRON ecosystem, helping users to easily unlock multi-level income.
At the same time, USDD launched a 30-day limited TRX Vault minting promotion. Users mint and deposit USDD through TRX or sTRX Vault to enjoy a reduction in the stability rate and have the opportunity to enjoy gas fee subsidies. In addition, the USDD x JustLend DAO Taskon event was launched simultaneously. Users only need to complete the designated tasks and knowledge quiz tests from April 15 to April 29 to share a 500 USDD reward pool.

data.title: Galaxy Digital wallets withdraw 9,368 ETH from Binance and Bullish.com in the past hour
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to monitoring by on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Galaxy Digital's associated wallet withdrew 9,368 ETH from Binance and Bullish.com in the past hour, worth US$15.4 million, with an average withdrawal price of US$1,644.

data.title: Bitget Wallet announces support for Hemi mainnet, a modular blockchain network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Web3 wallet Bitget Wallet announced that it officially supports the modular blockchain network Hemi mainnet, providing users with a more efficient digital asset management experience. Users can now conveniently transfer and receive assets on the Hemi chain through Bitget Wallet, and connect the wallet through the Hemi official website for cross-chain operations. In addition, Bitget Wallet is about to launch the Hemi Ecosystem Points event to unlock more gameplay and benefits for users.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-04-15)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.68T, down by -0.56% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $83,709 and $85,990 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $85,860, up by 1.62%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include KERNEL, ACH, and BAL, up by 223%, 36%, and 29%, respectively.
